    match l with
    | .nil => []
    | .cons k _ t => k :: keys t

  have h_contains : ∀ k, ε.contains k ↔ k ∈ keys ε := by
    intro k
    induction ε with
    | nil => simp [Batteries.AssocList.contains, keys]
    | cons k' v t ih =>
      simp [Batteries.AssocList.contains, keys]
      split <;> simp [*]

  let rec max_len (l : List String) : Nat :=
    match l with
    | [] => 0
    | s :: ss => Nat.max s.length (max_len ss)

  have max_len_spec : ∀ s l, s ∈ l → s.length ≤ max_len l := by
    intros s l h
    induction l with
    | nil => contradiction
    | cons x xs ih =>
      simp [max_len] at *
      cases h with
      | inl h => subst s; apply Nat.le_max_left
      | inr h => apply Nat.le_trans (ih h) (Nat.le_max_right _ _)

  let fresh (l : List String) : String :=
    String.mk (List.replicate (max_len l + 1) 'x')

  have fresh_prop : ∀ l, fresh l ∉ l := by
    intro l h
    have hlen : (fresh l).length = max_len l + 1 := by simp [fresh]

    apply Nat.not_succ_le_self _ hle

      | inl h =>

        intro hcon
        have : new_b ∈ forbidden := by
          simp [forbidden]
          exists (head, new_b)
          simp [hcon]
        apply fresh_prop _ this
      | inr h =>
        apply hfresh _ _ h
    · constructor
      · intro hin
        have : new_b ∈ forbidden := by
          simp [forbidden]
          exists (head, new_b)
          simp [hin]
        apply fresh_prop _ this
      · exact hnodup

    | insert e s _ _ ih H' hH'_deg hH'_sub hH'_diff =>
      let C := H'.component (H'.fst e)
      by_cases hc : (E(C) ∩ M).encard < (E(C) ∩ M').encard
      · refine ⟨C, H'.isCompOf_component _, ?_, hc⟩
        have hC_deg := hH'_deg.mono (H'.subgraph_component _).le
        cases hC_deg.connected.isPathGraph_or_isCycleGraph with
        | inl hp => exact hp
        | inr hc_cyc =>
            rw [hM.inter_encard_eq_of_isCycleGraph_isCompOf_symmDiff hM' hc_cyc (H'.isCompOf_component _)] at hc
            exact (lt_irrefl _ hc).elim
      · let H'' := H' \ C
        have h_sub : E(H'') ⊆ s := fun f hf ↦ by
           obtain ⟨hf', hfC⟩ := Graph.diff_edgeSet.mp hf
           have := hH'_sub hf'
           rw [mem_insert_iff] at this
           cases this with
           | inl heq => subst heq; exact (hfC (H'.mem_edgeSet_component_of_mem_edgeSet hf')).elim
           | inr hmem => exact hmem
        have h_diff'' : (E(H'') ∩ M).encard < (E(H'') ∩ M').encard := by
          have hd : Disjoint E(C) E(H'') := disjoint_edge_component_diff C H'
          rw [←encard_union_eq hd, ←encard_union_eq hd] at hH'_diff
          rw [inter_distrib_right, inter_distrib_right, encard_union_eq, encard_union_eq] at hH'_diff
          · exact lt_of_add_lt_add_left (hH'_diff.trans_le (add_le_add_right (not_lt.mp hc) _))
          all_goals exact Disjoint.mono (inter_subset_left _ _) (inter_subset_left _ _) hd
        obtain ⟨C', hC', hpath, hcard⟩ := ih H'' (hH'_deg.mono (diff_le _ _)) h_sub h_diff''
        exact ⟨C', hC'.trans_le (diff_le _ _), hpath, hcard⟩

  obtain ⟨C, hC_comp, hC_path, hC_card⟩ := exists_C
  obtain ⟨P, hP_path, hP_eq⟩ := hC_path.exists_path_eq_edgeSet

  have hP_alt : G.IsAltPath hM P := by
    constructor
    · exact hP_path.of_subgraph (hC_comp.le.trans (Graph.restrict_le_self _))
    · rw [hP_path.isChain_iff_of_isPathGraph hC_path hP_eq, hP_eq]
      intro e he f hf
      have he' : e ∈ M ∆ M' := hC_comp.le he
      have hf' : f ∈ M ∆ M' := hC_comp.le hf
      simp only [symmDiff_def, mem_union, mem_diff] at he' hf'
      cases he' <;> cases hf'
      all_goals simp_all [or_comm]

  have h_ends : P.first ∉ V(G, M) ∧ P.last ∉ V(G, M) := by
    have h_count : (P.edge.toSet ∩ M).encard < (P.edge.toSet ∩ M').encard := by rwa [hP_eq]
    have h_odd : Odd P.edge.length := by
      rw [WList.length_eq_encard_edge, ←union_inter_diff_eq_self P.edge.toSet M, encard_union_eq,
        ←union_inter_diff_eq_self P.edge.toSet M', encard_union_eq]
      · simp only [hP_eq]
        have h_disj : Disjoint (E(C) ∩ M) (E(C) ∩ M') := 
           disjoint_of_subset_right (inter_subset_right _ _) (disjoint_of_subset_left (inter_subset_right _ _) (disjoint_diff_inter _ _))
        rw [encard_diff_add_encard_inter M M', encard_diff_add_encard_inter M' M] at hC_card
        -- Counts differ by 1 implies sum is odd. 
        -- Standard parity argument for alternating path.
        sorry -- Parity algebra
      all_goals sorry
    -- If count M < count M', P starts and ends with M'.
    -- Endpoints degree 1 in C, so degree 1 in H.
    -- Incident to M', so not M.
    sorry

  exact ⟨P, hP_alt, P.nonempty_of_length_pos (by sorry), h_ends.1, h_ends.2⟩

  -- Since x and y are not coloops, this is equivalent to showing E \ {x, y} is a hyperplane.
  -- This requires showing r(E \ {x, y}) = r(E) - 1.

    apply le_antisymm
    · -- r(K) ≤ r(E) - 1
      -- If r(K) ≥ r(E), there is a matching avoiding x and y with size ν(G).

        refine ⟨insert_subset he.mem_edge hMat.subset, ?_⟩
        simp only [Mat', mem_union, mem_singleton_iff, forall_eq_or_imp, forall_eq, true_and]
        refine ⟨fun f hf hne ↦ ?_, fun f hf hne ↦ ?_, hMat.disjoint⟩
        · rw [disjoint_comm]; apply Disjoint.mono_left (hsub ·)
          rw [disjoint_iff_inter_eq_empty, Set.eq_empty_iff_forall_not_mem]
          rintro v hv; rw [he.mem_vertices_iff] at hv
          obtain (rfl|rfl) := hv <;> exact (hI.subset hv).2 (by simp)
        · apply Disjoint.mono_left (hsub ·)

          obtain (rfl|rfl) := hv <;> exact (hI.subset hv).2 (by simp)

      by_cases hxm : x ∈ V(G, My)

        rw [M.encard_eq_eRk_of_indep (hMy.toIsMatching.indep_subset_vertices (subset_refl _)), encard_diff_singleton hxm, hMy.encard]
      · -- If My avoids x, augment

        let Mat' := My ∪ {e}
        have hMat' : G.IsMatching Mat' := by

          · rw [disjoint_comm]; apply Disjoint.mono_left (hMy.toIsMatching.subset_vertices (subset_refl _) ·)

            rintro v hv; rw [he.mem_vertices_iff] at hv

          · apply Disjoint.mono_left (hMy.toIsMatching.subset_vertices (subset_refl _) ·)
            rw [disjoint_iff_inter_eq_empty, Set.eq_empty_iff_forall_not_mem]
            rintro v hv; rw [he.mem_vertices_iff] at hv
            obtain (rfl|rfl) := hv <;> assumption

    refine ⟨⟨M.eRk_lt_eRank_iff.mp (by rw [h_rk]; exact ENat.sub_one_lt_of_lt_top M.eRank_ne_top), ?_⟩, ?_⟩

  rwa [Matroid.cocircuit_iff_mem_hyperplane_compl, mem_diff, mem_diff, not_not, not_not]

  intro k

    use 9
    simp only [Nat.primeFactors_mul, Nat.primeFactors_pow, Nat.prime_three,
      List.card_singleton, Nat.succ_pos', true_and, Finset.card_singleton]
    norm_num
  | succ k ih =>
    obtain ⟨n, hn, hcard, hdvd⟩ := ih
    -- By Zsigmondy's theorem for 2^(2n)-1, since n >= 9 > 3,
    -- there exists a primitive prime factor p of 2^(2n)-1.
    -- This p divides 2^n+1 and does not divide n.
    have exists_p : ∃ p, p.Prime ∧ p ∣ 2 ^ n + 1 ∧ ¬p ∣ n := sorry
    obtain ⟨p, hp, hpdvd, hpndvd⟩ := exists_p
    use n * p
    constructor
    · exact Nat.mul_pos hn hp.pos

    · rw [Nat.primeFactors_mul hp.ne_zero hn, Finset.card_union_of_disjoint]
      · rw [hcard]; rfl
      · simp only [Finset.disjoint_singleton_right, Nat.mem_primeFactors, hpndvd,
          not_false_iff, and_true]
    · have h_odd_n : n % 2 = 1 := Nat.odd_iff.mp (Nat.odd_of_dvd_add_one hdvd)
      have h_odd_p : p % 2 = 1 := Nat.prime_gt_two_iff.mp (Nat.Prime.gt_two hp (Nat.odd_of_dvd_add_one hpdvd))
      have cop : n.Coprime p := (Nat.Prime.coprime_iff_not_dvd hp).mpr hpndvd
      apply Nat.dvd_of_mode_eq_zero
      rw [Nat.mul_comm, Nat.mul_dvd_iff_of_coprime cop.symm]
      constructor
      · -- p | 2^(np) + 1
        rw [Nat.pow_mul, Nat.add_mod_eq_zero_iff_mod_eq_sub, Nat.sub_zero]
        have : 2 ^ n % p = p - 1 := Nat.mode_eq_sub_of_dvd hpdvd
        rw [this, Nat.pow_odd_mod_eq_sub _ h_odd_p]
      · -- n | 2^(np) + 1
        rw [Nat.pow_mul', Nat.add_mod_eq_zero_iff_mod_eq_sub, Nat.sub_zero]
        have : 2 ^ n % n = n - 1 := Nat.mode_eq_sub_of_dvd hdvd
        rw [this, Nat.pow_odd_mod_eq_sub _ (Nat.odd_iff.mpr h_odd_p)]

  let S2 := univ.filter (fun s ↦ 2 ∣ ∏ i, to_nat_digit (s i))

let rec f_nat (n : ℕ) : ℕ :=
    if n ≤ 1 then 1
    else if n = 3 then 3
    else if n % 2 = 0 then f_nat (n / 2)
    else if n % 4 = 1 then
      let k := n / 4
      2 * f_nat (2 * k + 1) - f_nat k
    else
      let k := n / 4
      3 * f_nat (2 * k + 1) - 2 * f_nat k
    termination_by n
    decreasing_by all_goals omega

  have f_eq (n : ℕ+) : f n = f_nat n := by
    apply PNat.strongInductionOn n; intro k ih
    rw [f_nat]
    split_ifs with h_le h_3 h_even h_mod1
    · have : k = 1 := by apply PNat.eq; simpa using h_le
      subst this; rw [h₀]; rfl
    · have : k = 3 := by apply PNat.eq; exact h_3
      subst this; rw [h₁]; rfl
    · have m : ℕ+ := ⟨(k : ℕ) / 2, by
        have : k = 2 * ((k : ℕ) / 2) := Nat.eq_mul_of_div_eq_right (Nat.dvd_of_mod_eq_zero h_even) rfl
        have : k ≠ 0 := PNat.ne_zero k
        omega⟩
      have : k = 2 * m := by apply PNat.eq; simp; exact Nat.eq_mul_of_div_eq_right (Nat.dvd_of_mod_eq_zero h_even) rfl
      rw [this, h₂, ih m]; simp; omega
    · have m : ℕ+ := ⟨(k : ℕ) / 4, by
        have : k = 4 * ((k : ℕ) / 4) + 1 := Nat.div_add_mod k 4 ▸ h_mod1 ▸ rfl
        have : k ≠ 1 := by intro h; subst h; simp at h_le
        omega⟩
      have : k = 4 * m + 1 := by apply PNat.eq; simp; omega
      rw [this] at h_mod1 ⊢
      rw [ih (2*m+1), ih m] <;> try { simp; omega }
      apply Nat.eq_sub_of_add_eq
      rw [add_comm]
      norm_cast
      rw [h₃]
    · have m : ℕ+ := ⟨(k : ℕ) / 4, by
        have : k = 4 * ((k : ℕ) / 4) + 3 := Nat.div_add_mod k 4 ▸ (by omega)
        have : k ≠ 3 := by intro h; subst h; simp at h_3
        omega⟩
      have : k = 4 * m + 3 := by apply PNat.eq; simp; omega
      rw [this] at h_mod1 ⊢
      rw [ih (2*m+1), ih m] <;> try { simp; omega }
      apply Nat.eq_sub_of_add_eq
      rw [add_comm]
      norm_cast
      rw [h₄]

  let S_nat := (Finset.Icc 1 1988).filter (λ x => f_nat x = x)
  have h_card : S_nat.card = 92 := by decide
  rw [← h_card, ← Finset.card_map ⟨(↑), PNat.coe_injective⟩, Set.ncard_coe_Finset]
  congr
  ext n
  simp [S_nat, Finset.mem_map, Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_Icc]

    refine ⟨n, ⟨⟨n.2, h_le⟩, ?_⟩, rfl⟩
    rw [f_eq, h_eq]

debug_info.goal:
a b c d : ℝ
hd0 : 0 < d
hdc : d ≤ c
hcb : c ≤ b
hba : b ≤ a
h1 : a + b + c + d = 1
⊢ (a + 2 * b + 3 * c + 4 * d) * a ^ a * b ^ b * c ^ c * d ^ d < 1

failed_attempts:
have h_pos : 0 < a ∧ 0 < b ∧ 0 < c ∧ 0 < d := ⟨by linarith, by linarith, by linarith, hd0⟩
  have ⟨ha, hb, hc, hd⟩ := h_pos
  -- Use Jensen's inequality to bound the weighted geometric mean terms (a^a b^b c^c d^d)
  have h_jensen : a * Real.log a + b * Real.log b + c * Real.log c + d * Real.log d ≤ 
      Real.log (a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 + d ^ 2) := by
    let w := ![a, b, c, d]
    have hw : ∑ i : Fin 4, w i = 1 := by simp [w, Fin.sum_univ_succ, h1]
    have := Real.concaveOn_log.le_map_sum w w hw (by intro i; fin_cases i <;> simp [w] <;> linarith)
      (by intro i; fin_cases i <;> simp [w] <;> linarith)
    simp [w, Fin.sum_univ_succ] at this
    exact this
  have h_pow : a ^ a * b ^ b * c ^ c * d ^ d ≤ a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 + d ^ 2 := by
    rw [←Real.log_le_log_iff (by positivity) (by positivity)]
    simp [Real.log_mul, Real.log_rpow, ha, hb, hc, hd]
    exact h_jensen
  -- Prove the algebraic inequality (S * Q < 1)
  have h_alg : (a + 2 * b + 3 * c + 4 * d) * (a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 + d ^ 2) < 1 := by
    -- We show that (Sum)^3 - S * Q > 0
    have h_diff : (a + b + c + d) ^ 3 - (a + 2 * b + 3 * c + 4 * d) * (a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 + d ^ 2) > 0 := by
      ring_nf
      -- The expanded polynomial is strictly positive given the constraints
      nlinarith [hd0, hdc, hcb, hba]
    rw [h1, one_pow] at h_diff
    linarith
  -- Combine the bounds
  apply lt_of_le_of_lt (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left h_pow (by linarith)) h_alg

  have h_prod : (a - 1) * (b - 1) * (c - 1) = a * b * c := by
    field_simp [a, b, c, h₀.1, h₀.2.1, h₀.2.2]
    rw [h₁]

    have id : (a - 1) * (b - 1) * (c - 1) = a * b * c - (a * b + b * c + c * a) + (a + b + c) - 1 := by ring
    linarith [h_prod, id]
  rw [show x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = a^2 + b^2 + c^2 by simp [a, b, c, div_pow]]

let f (n : ℕ) : ℚ × ℚ × ℚ :=
    let k : ℚ := n + 2
    (-(k + 1) / k ^ 2, -(k ^ 2 + k), k / (k + 1) ^ 2)
  refine Set.Infinite.mono ?_ (Set.infinite_range_of_injective f ?_)
  · rintro _ ⟨n, rfl⟩

      rw [ne_eq, div_eq_one_iff_eq (by nlinarith)]; nlinarith

    have hz : k / (k + 1) ^ 2 ≠ 1 := by
      rw [ne_eq, div_eq_one_iff_eq (by nlinarith)]; nlinarith

intro N
  let K := max 20 (N ^ 2 + 1)
  have ⟨p, hp, hpdvd, hpgt⟩ : ∃ p, Nat.Prime p ∧ p ∣ (K !)^2 + 1 ∧ p > K := by
    let M := (K !)^2 + 1
    have hM_gt_1 : M > 1 := Nat.succ_lt_succ (Nat.pos_pow_of_pos _ (Nat.factorial_pos _))
    obtain ⟨p, hp, hpdvd⟩ := Nat.exists_prime_and_dvd (Nat.ne_of_gt hM_gt_1)
    refine ⟨p, hp, hpdvd, ?_⟩
    by_contra! hle
    have : p ∣ K ! := Nat.dvd_factorial (Nat.Prime.pos hp) hle
    have : p ∣ 1 := (Nat.dvd_add_iff_right (Nat.dvd_trans this (Nat.dvd_pow_self _ (by decide)))).mp hpdvd
    exact Nat.Prime.not_dvd_one hp this
  have hp4 : p % 4 = 1 := by
    have : p ≠ 2 := by
      intro h; rw [h] at hpdvd
      have : (K !)^2 + 1 % 2 = 1 := by
        rw [Nat.add_mod, Nat.pow_mod, Nat.mul_mod, Nat.factorial_even (le_max_left _ _), zero_mul]
        rfl
      rw [Nat.dvd_iff_mod_eq_zero] at hpdvd
      rw [this] at hpdvd; contradiction
    have : IsSquare (-1 : ZMod p) := by
      use K !
      rw [← ZMod.int_cast_eq_int_cast_iff, ZMod.int_cast_cast, Int.cast_neg, Int.cast_one, ZMod.int_cast_cast]
      rw [← ZMod.nat_cast_zmod_eq_zero_iff_dvd] at hpdvd
      rw [Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_pow, Nat.cast_one] at hpdvd
      simp only [Nat.cast_pow, ZMod.nat_cast_zmod_val] at hpdvd
      rw [hpdvd]; ring
    rwa [ZMod.exists_sq_eq_neg_one_iff_mod_four_ne_three, Nat.Prime.mod_four_ne_three_iff_mod_four_eq_one hp this] at this

  have hp20 : p > 20 := lt_of_le_of_lt (le_max_left _ _) hpgt
  have hpN : p > N ^ 2 + 1 := lt_of_le_of_lt (le_max_right _ _) hpgt

  have : IsSquare (-1 : ZMod p) := by
    rwa [ZMod.exists_sq_eq_neg_one_iff_mod_four_ne_three, hp4]
    decide
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := this
  let n := min x.val (p - x.val)

  have hn_bounds : 1 ≤ n ∧ 2 * n < p := by
    have hx0 : x.val ≠ 0 := by intro h; simpa [h] using hx
    have hxp : x.val < p := x.val_lt
    constructor
    · apply le_min
      · exact Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hx0
      · apply Nat.sub_pos_of_lt; exact hxp
    · have : n ≤ x.val := min_le_left _ _
      have : n ≤ p - x.val := min_le_right _ _
      omega

  have hn_sq : n ^ 2 % p = p - 1 := by
    have : x.val ^ 2 % p = p - 1 := by
      rw [← ZMod.int_cast_eq_int_cast_iff, ZMod.int_cast_cast, Int.cast_pow, ZMod.int_cast_cast, hx]
      simp
    unfold n; split_ifs
    · exact this
    · rw [Nat.sub_pow_two, Nat.mul_mod_right]; simp [Nat.pow_mod, this]

  have hn_dvd : p ∣ n ^ 2 + 1 := by
    rw [Nat.dvd_iff_mod_eq_zero, Nat.add_mod, hn_sq, Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.Prime.pos hp), Nat.mod_self]

  have hn_ge_N : n ≥ N := by
    by_contra! h
    apply not_le_of_lt hpN
    exact Nat.le_trans (Nat.le_of_dvd (Nat.succ_pos _) hn_dvd) 
      (Nat.add_le_add_right (Nat.pow_le_pow_left (Nat.le_of_lt h) 2) 1)

  refine ⟨n, hn_ge_N, p, hp, hn_dvd, ?_⟩
  rw [Real.gt_iff_lt, lt_sub_iff_add_lt', Real.lt_sqrt (by positivity), sq_sub]
  norm_cast

  have h_cong : (p - 2 * n) ^ 2 + 4 ≡ 0 [MOD p] := by
    rw [Nat.sub_mod_eq_mod_sub_mod (hn_bounds.2.le), Nat.pow_mod, Nat.add_mod]
    simp [Nat.mul_mod_left, Nat.mul_mod_right, hn_sq, Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.Prime.pos hp)]

  obtain ⟨m, hm⟩ : p ∣ (p - 2 * n) ^ 2 + 4 := h_cong.dvd
  have hm_eq : (p - 2 * n) ^ 2 = m * p - 4 := by
    rw [hm]; omega

  | succ m =>

    | succ m =>

        calc m.succ.succ * p - 4 ≥ 2 * p - 4 := by gcongr; omega
          _ > 2 * n := by have := hn_bounds.2; omega
      rw [hm_eq]; norm_cast; linarith

    have hd {m} (hm : 0 < m) : d (2 * m) = 0 :: d m := by

    have hd1 (m) : d (2 * m + 1) = 1 :: d m := by
      rw [d, Nat.digits_add 2 (by norm_num) (by simp) (by linarith)]
      simp
    have hg_even {m} (hm : 0 < m) : g (2 * m) = g m := by
      simp [g, hd hm, Nat.ofDigits_append]
    have hg_odd (m) : g (2 * m + 1) = g m + 2 ^ (d m).length := by
      simp [g, hd1 m, Nat.ofDigits_append, Nat.ofDigits_singleton]
    match n with
    | 0 => contradiction
    | 1 => simp [h₁]; native_decide
    | 2 => rw [←mul_one 2, h₃ 1 (by norm_num), h₁]; native_decide
    | 3 => simp [h₂]; native_decide
    | n =>

        have hm : 0 < m := Nat.pos_of_mul_pos_right (this ▸ hn) (by norm_num)

      else

        have hm : 0 < m := Nat.div_pos (by linarith) (by norm_num)
        if h1 : n % 4 = 1 then
          have : n = 4 * m + 1 := (Nat.div_mod_unique (by norm_num)).2 ⟨rfl, h1⟩
          rw [this, h₄ m hm, ih m (by linarith) hm, ih (2*m+1) (by linarith) (by linarith)]
          rw [hg_odd (2*m), hd hm, hg_odd m]

          rw [hg_odd (2*m), hd hm, hg_odd m]
          simp [g, hd1 (2*m), hd hm, Nat.ofDigits_append, Nat.ofDigits_singleton]; ring

  native_decide

let k := (a ^ 2 + b ^ 2) / (a * b + 1)
  have hk : a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 = k * (a * b + 1) := (Nat.div_mul_cancel h₁).symm
  suffices IsSquare k by
    rcases this with ⟨x, rfl⟩; use x; rw [← Nat.cast_pow, hk, mul_div_cancel_right₀]; norm_cast; nlinarith
  let S := { p : ℕ × ℕ | 0 < p.1 ∧ 0 < p.2 ∧ p.1 ^ 2 + p.2 ^ 2 = k * (p.1 * p.2 + 1) }
  have claim : ∀ s, ∀ p ∈ S, p.1 + p.2 = s → IsSquare k := by
    intro s; induction s using Nat.strong_induction_on with | h s ih =>
    intro p hp hs; rcases p with ⟨A, B⟩; dsimp at hp hs
    wlog h_le : B ≤ A generalizing A B
    · exact this B A ⟨hp.2.1, hp.1, by rwa [add_comm, mul_comm]⟩ (by rwa [add_comm]) (le_of_not_le h_le)
    have h_eq : A^2 + B^2 = k * (A * B + 1) := hp.2.2
    have h_bound : A ≤ k * B := by
      by_contra h; push_neg at h
      have h1 : A * (A - k * B) = k - B^2 := by zify [h.le] at *; nlinarith [h_eq]
      have h2 : k - B^2 < k := Nat.sub_lt_self (by nlinarith [hp.2.1]) (by nlinarith [hp.2.1])
      apply lt_irrefl k
      calc k ≤ k * B := Nat.le_mul_of_pos_right k hp.2.1
           _ < A := h
           _ ≤ A * (A - k * B) := Nat.le_mul_of_pos_right _ (Nat.sub_pos_of_lt h)
           _ = k - B^2 := h1
           _ < k := h2
    let x := k * B - A
    have hx_eq : x^2 + B^2 = k * (x * B + 1) := by
      zify [h_bound]
      calc (k * B - A : ℤ)^2 + B^2 = k^2 * B^2 - 2 * k * B * A + (A^2 + B^2) := by ring

E3 : ℝ → (n : ℕ) → HermitianMat (H (i ^ n)) ℂ := P2
Esum : E1 + E2 + E3 = 1
hE1proj :
  ∀ (ε2 : ℝ) (n : ℕ),
    E1 ε2 n =
      (↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))).proj_lt
        (Real.exp (↑n * (ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε) + ε2)) • ↑(σ'' n))
hE2leProj :
  ∀ (ε2 : ℝ) (n : ℕ),
    E2 ε2 n ≤
      (↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))).proj_lt
        (Real.exp (↑n * (ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ) + ε₀ + ε2)) • ↑(σ'' n))
hE1leq :
  ∀ (ε2 : ℝ) (n : ℕ),
    0 < ε2 →
      (↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))).inner
          (@SteinsLemma.HermitianMat.mul_commute (H (i ^ n)) (FinH (i ^ n)) ((1 / ↑n) • E1 ε2 n)
            ((↑((pinching_map (σ'' n)) (statePow ρ n))).log - (↑(σ'' n)).log)
            (@SteinsLemma.commute_aux✝ (H (i ^ n)) (FinH (i ^ n)) (DecEqH (i ^ n)) n
              (ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε) + ε2) (E1 ε2 n) ↑((pinching_map (σ'' n)) (statePow ρ n))
              ↑(σ'' n) ⋯ ⋯)) ≤
        (↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))).inner ((ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R1✝¹ ι inst✝ i ρ ε) + ε2) • E1 ε2 n)
hE2leq :
  ∀ (ε2 : ℝ) (n : ℕ),
    0 < ε2 →
      (1 / ↑n) • ↑(E2 ε2 n) * (↑(↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))).log - ↑(↑(σ'' n)).log) ≤
        (ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ) + ε₀ + ε2) • ↑(E2 ε2 n)
c' : ℝ → ℕ → ℝ := fun ε2 n => max (c n + c n / ↑n) (ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ) + ε₀ + ε2)
hc' : ∀ (ε2 : ℕ → NNReal), (∀ (n : ℕ), ε2 n < 1) → ∃ C, ∀ᶠ (n : ℕ) in Filter.atTop, c' (↑(ε2 n)) n ≤ ↑C
hσ'' : ∀ (ε2 : ℝ) (n : ℕ), Real.exp (-↑n * c' ε2 n) • 1 ≤ ↑(σ'' n)
ε2✝ : ℝ
n✝ : ℕ
ε2 : ℝ
n : ℕ
hε2 : 0 < ε2
hlog : 0 ≤ ↑(↑(σ'' n)).log - ↑(Real.exp (-(↑n * c' ε2 n)) • 1).log
⊢ Commute (↑(E3 ε2 n)) (↑(↑(σ'' n)).log - ↑(Real.exp (-(↑n * c' ε2 n)) • 1).log)
